# Documention And The Importance Of It

Without documentation there would be a lot more problems to deal with. When you write a documentation for your project your future self and others may end up reading it and understanding it with the given explanations from your document even when time passes.

If that documentation did not exist then most people would end up leaving and the ones that stay will end up having to piece your work together.

One thing to make sure of is to not make a bad documentation. A bad documentation is worse than not having one at all.
